case_title: CREDITOR'S ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. CWC TRANSPORTATION, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-29-2021 CONTINUED TO MAR-02-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66879308) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITOR'S ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
